summary: The diff implements most requirements successfully, including homepage updates, About page content, logo replacement, image upload capabilities, comment section, and visual design improvements. However, no evidence confirms the uploaded 'website logo.png' file was actually added to the assets directory, though the code references it correctly.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the existing site logo with the uploaded 'website logo.png' throughout the application (navigation header and footer)
missing_requirements.reason: While Navigation.tsx and Footer.tsx both reference '/assets/website-logo.png', the diff shows no added files. The ADDED FILES section explicitly states 'none', so there's no evidence the logo file was actually uploaded to the assets directory.
